creator: edwin@mavetju.org
text:
On Thu, May 29, 2008 at 10:41:14AM -0400, Peter Thoenen wrote:
> Not sure what to dell you ... I get the same errors as you do with your 
> modified Makefile but it works fine with my original Makefile (just 
> tried again) .. can you confirm you can build with my original 
> unmodified Makefile

With the standard port:

[~/cvs/ports/NEW/winexe] root@build2>make
===>  Extracting for winexe-071026
=> MD5 Checksum OK for winexe-source-071026.tar.bz2.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for winexe-source-071026.tar.bz2.
===>  Patching for winexe-071026
===>  Configuring for winexe-071026
cd /var/ports/root/cvs/ports/NEW/winexe/work/winexe-source-071026 && /var/ports/root/cvs/ports/NEW/winexe/work/winexe-source-071026/autogen.sh
/var/ports/root/cvs/ports/NEW/winexe/work/winexe-source-071026/autogen.sh: need autoconf 2.53 or later to build samba from SVN
*** Error code 1

But with autoconfg-261 (+wrapper + m4) installed it works fine now.
I'll figure it out!

Edwin
